title: cyclosorus cretaceus
intro: Cyclosorus cretaceus, also known as the Cretaceous Cyclosorus, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Cyclosorus cretaceus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate pain and reduce the risk of infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
